problem id: e553bd78
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10100100 -> 11000010
  10101110 -> 11101111
  00110011 -> 11010101
  10000101 -> 01010110
  11101001 -> 11010000
  01101111 -> 10001011
  01011010 -> 01000101
  01011101 -> 01011010
  00111111 -> 11100011
  11001011 -> 01001001

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 00010010
